Welcome

Legacy Towing

Legacy Towing has been serving Tulsa and the surrounding region with premium towing services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Tulsa Trusts Legacy Towing

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Emergency Towing

Impound Recovery

Heavy Duty Recovery

When your dump truck buries itself in a Jenks construction site or your RV jams on a steep Keystone Lake access road, st...

Classic Car Transport

Transporting your restored '57 Thunderbird to the Brady Arts car show? Moving Grandpa's Model A to your Broken Arrow gar...
Our Difference

Contact Us →
“
Flat tire on the BA Expressway during rush hour - Legacy had me hooked up before the highway patrol even arrived. Driver knew exactly how to position the truck to block traffic safely. Will never call anyone else in Tulsa.
— Marcus T.
